_comment: Config for scripts/fetch-roster.mjs. Run `npm run roster:list` to print every Holdsport member with their id + role + name, then adjust the lists below.
_excludeComment: Member IDs to HIDE from the website even though their Holdsport account is still active (e.g. players who haven't shown up in ages). Find IDs via `npm run roster:list`. The name after each id is just a reminder.
_overridesComment: Per-member detail the Holdsport API does not provide. Key = member id (string). group:'staff' puts them in the Coaches & Staff section. roleKey must match a key under team.roles in src/i18n. emoji shows on the card. alsoPlayer:true keeps a staff member listed in the squad too.
